name: What should I change on my website before I ask someone to optimize it?
description: Make sure your pages have clear topics, accurate business details, and one main action per page. That gives optimization work a much better chance of succeeding

mainEntity.name: What should I change on my website before I ask someone to optimize it?

acceptedAnswer.text: Do not use one generic answer for everything. Voice optimization works best when each page targets one intent, one audience, and one clear action, especially on service and location pages.
acceptedAnswer.description: Make sure your pages have clear topics, accurate business details, and one main action per page. That gives optimization work a much better chance of succeeding.
